theory YellowDiffTest

begin

// Function signature and definition of the equational theory E

functions: fst/1, h/1, pair/2, snd/1
equations: fst(<x.1, x.2>) = x.1, snd(<x.1, x.2>) = x.2

rule (modulo E) Start:
   [ Fr( ~s ) ]
  --[ Start( ~s, diff(fst(~s), <~s, ~s>) ) ]->
   [ State( ~s, diff(~s, <~s, ~s>) ) ]

rule (modulo E) End:
   [ State( s, t ) ] --[ End( s, t ) ]-> [ Out( s ), Out( h(t) ) ]

restriction Start2Complication [right]:
  "∀ s t #i. (Start( s, t ) @ #i) ⇒ (s ⊏ t)"
  // safety formula

restriction Start2Complication [left]:
  "∀ s t #i. (Start( s, t ) @ #i) ⇒ (s ⊏ t)"
  // safety formula

lemma GreenYellow [right]:
  exists-trace "∃ s t #i. End( s, t ) @ #i"
/*
guarded formula characterizing all satisfying traces:
"∃ s t #i. (End( s, t ) @ #i)"
*/
simplify
solve( State( s, t ) ▶₀ #i )
  case Start
  SOLVED // trace found
qed

lemma GreenYellow [left]:
  exists-trace "∃ s t #i. End( s, t ) @ #i"
/*
guarded formula characterizing all satisfying traces:
"∃ s t #i. (End( s, t ) @ #i)"
*/
simplify
solve( State( s, t ) ▶₀ #i )
  case Start
  by UNFINISHABLE // reducible operator in subterm
qed

lemma RedYellow [right]:
  all-traces "¬(∃ s t #i. End( s, t ) @ #i)"
/*
guarded formula characterizing all counter-examples:
"∃ s t #i. (End( s, t ) @ #i)"
*/
simplify
solve( State( s, t ) ▶₀ #i )
  case Start
  SOLVED // trace found
qed

lemma RedYellow [left]:
  all-traces "¬(∃ s t #i. End( s, t ) @ #i)"
/*
guarded formula characterizing all counter-examples:
"∃ s t #i. (End( s, t ) @ #i)"
*/
simplify
solve( State( s, t ) ▶₀ #i )
  case Start
  by UNFINISHABLE // reducible operator in subterm
qed

lemma YellowRed [right]:
  exists-trace "¬(∀ s t #i. (End( s, t ) @ #i) ⇒ (<s, s> = t))"
/*
guarded formula characterizing all satisfying traces:
"∃ s t #i. (End( s, t ) @ #i) ∧ ¬(<s, s> = t)"
*/
simplify
solve( State( s, t ) ▶₀ #i )
  case Start
  by contradiction /* from formulas */
qed

lemma YellowRed [left]:
  exists-trace "¬(∀ s t #i. (End( s, t ) @ #i) ⇒ (<s, s> = t))"
/*
guarded formula characterizing all satisfying traces:
"∃ s t #i. (End( s, t ) @ #i) ∧ ¬(<s, s> = t)"
*/
simplify
solve( State( s, t ) ▶₀ #i )
  case Start
  by UNFINISHABLE // reducible operator in subterm
qed

lemma YellowGreen [right]:
  all-traces "∀ s t #i. (End( s, t ) @ #i) ⇒ (<s, s> = t)"
/*
guarded formula characterizing all counter-examples:
"∃ s t #i. (End( s, t ) @ #i) ∧ ¬(<s, s> = t)"
*/
simplify
solve( State( s, t ) ▶₀ #i )
  case Start
  by contradiction /* from formulas */
qed

lemma YellowGreen [left]:
  all-traces "∀ s t #i. (End( s, t ) @ #i) ⇒ (<s, s> = t)"
/*
guarded formula characterizing all counter-examples:
"∃ s t #i. (End( s, t ) @ #i) ∧ ¬(<s, s> = t)"
*/
simplify
solve( State( s, t ) ▶₀ #i )
  case Start
  by UNFINISHABLE // reducible operator in subterm
qed

diffLemma Observational_equivalence:
rule-equivalence
  case Rule_Equality
  backward-search
    case RHS
    step( simplify )
    step( solve( !KD( x ) ▶₁ #i ) )
      case End_case_2
      step( solve( (#vl, 0) ~~> (#i, 1) ) )
        case h
        step( solve( State( s, t ) ▶₀ #vr ) )
          case Start
          step( solve( !KU( h(<~s, ~s>) ) @ #vk ) )
            case c_h
            step( solve( !KU( ~s ) @ #vk.2 ) )
              case End
              by ATTACK // trace found
            qed
          qed
        qed
      qed
    qed
  qed
qed

/* All wellformedness checks were successful. */

/*
Generated from:
Tamarin version 1.13.0
Maude version 3.5.1
Git revision: 0234f6a1abee25677c0accef62de0ac2883b0347 (with uncommited changes), branch: HEAD
Compiled at: 2026-07-16 18:33:16.036427196 UTC
*/

end

summary of summaries:

analyzed: /home/kamilner/tamarin-rs/tamarin-prover/examples/csf23-subterms/YellowDiffTest.spthy

  processing time: 0.17s
  
  RHS :  GreenYellow (exists-trace): verified (3 steps)
  LHS :  GreenYellow (exists-trace): analysis cannot be finished (reducible operators in subterms) (3 steps)
  RHS :  RedYellow (all-traces): falsified - found trace (3 steps)
  LHS :  RedYellow (all-traces): analysis cannot be finished (reducible operators in subterms) (3 steps)
  RHS :  YellowRed (exists-trace): falsified - no trace found (3 steps)
  LHS :  YellowRed (exists-trace): analysis cannot be finished (reducible operators in subterms) (3 steps)
  RHS :  YellowGreen (all-traces): verified (3 steps)
  LHS :  YellowGreen (all-traces): analysis cannot be finished (reducible operators in subterms) (3 steps)
  DiffLemma:  Observational_equivalence : falsified - found trace (9 steps)
